Petition By Executor To Establish Estate Ownership To Real Property
Off Calendar Oct-29-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Jason Louie appeared in person for and with Carrie Hui (petitoner).

Hearing no objections, the matter is taken under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported

Petition By Executor To Establish Estate Ownership To Real Property
Off Calendar Sep-23-2025 Continued To Oct-28-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Jason Louie appeared in person for and with Carrie Hui (petitioner).

Mr. Louie stated that the parties had a side partnership agreement, that she was the broker of the company, and that she signed a notarized agreement.

The Court requires further briefing and to find a case that references to this matter.
The briefing is due on October 14, 2025.

The matter is continued to October 28, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Lozada. Not reported.

Petition For Removal Of Executor And Appointment Of Successor Executor
Off Calendar Mar-04-2025 Off Calendar

Petition For Removal Of Executor And Appointment Of Successor Executor
Off Calendar Feb-04-2025 Continued To Mar-04-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jason Louie for Carrie Hui, Executor.
Jaynry Mak for and with Fernando Rigonan, Petitioner (via Zoom).

Ms. Mak stated she was recently retained as counsel for Petitioner Fernando Riganen requested a continuance to allow time to review the case file. Mr. Louie objected, arguing that the matter had been scheduled for some time and that Mr. Riganen had been threatening legal action for eight months.

The court continued the matter to March 4, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204 to allow Ms. Mak time to review the case.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-11-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jason Louie for and with Petitioner/Executor Carrie Hui (via Zoom).
Fernando Rigonan, Beneficiary in Propria Persona.

Objections by Mr. Rigonan were heard as to the appointment of Carrie Hui as executor of the estate. Mr. Rigonan informed the court that he also filed a petition for removal of the proposed executor on December 10, 2024, which was set for hearing on February 4, 2025.

Mr. Louie argued that the estate requires immediate representation to protect assets from waste, noting unpaid HOA fees, petition liens, rental properties lacking management, and unresolved title issues. Mr. Rigonan raised objections, claiming delays in filing, irregularities in the will and trust, and personal financial claims against the estate. The court overruled Mr. Rigonan's objections for the purpose of this hearing.

The court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will and codicil, both dated March 4, 2024, are admitted to probate. Carrie Hui is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $4.1 million. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for December 23, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, no appearance is required on that date. Shirley Yawitz is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
